<!--
  Thanks for contributing to GATE. Please fill out the sections below.
  Keep the description focused; link related issues rather than restating them.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? One or two paragraphs. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Security

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

## How was this tested?

<!--
  Describe the tests you ran and any new tests added. For runtime changes,
  include the commands you used (e.g. `make test-integration`, `make dev`).
-->

## Security considerations

<!--
  Required if this PR touches authentication, authorization, OIDC validation,
  policy evaluation, token issuance, audit, secrets handling, network policy,
  or any IAM/RBAC surface. Otherwise write "N/A".
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow the project's commit-message conventions
- [ ] License headers are present on new files (`pre-commit run addlicense`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated, and `make test` passes
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / docs / inline) where behavior changed
- [ ] No new long-lived secrets or credentials are introduced
- [ ] Backward-compatible, or migration / upgrade notes included
